sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Jefferies Downgrades PTC Therapeutics (PTCT) to 'Hold' with Price Target Adjustment | PTCT Stock News
feed.summary: Jefferies has downgraded PTC Therapeutics (PTCT) from a 'Buy' to a 'Hold' rating, lowering its price target from $91.00 to $76.00. This adjustment reflects a 16.48% decrease and follows a series of recent analyst actions with varying ratings and price targets. Despite the downgrade, the average one-year price target from 15 analysts is $86.07, suggesting a potential upside of 31.12% from the current price, though GuruFocus' GF Value estimates a 45.73% downside.

feed.title: PTL (NASDAQ:PTLE) Shares Up 6.1% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: PTL (NASDAQ:PTLE) shares rose 6.1% during Monday's mid-day trading, reaching as high as $5.33 before settling at $5.23, although trading volume was significantly low at 5,328 shares. The company has a consensus "Sell" rating from analysts, including a reissued "Sell" (D-) from Weiss Ratings, with its stock trading below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. PTL Limited provides marine fuel logistics services and is based in Hong Kong.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) Could Change Following ICOTYDE’s Phase 3 Psoriasis Data Release - Learn Why
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) has released positive one-year Phase 3 data for its oral drug ICOTYDE (icotrokinra) for moderate to severe plaque psoriasis, highlighting its potential as an alternative to injectables and the strength of its peptide discovery platform. This data, along with ICOTYDE's recent FDA approval and rusfertide's priority review, shifts the company's focus from clinical milestones to commercial execution, raising new questions about pricing, market access, and real-world safety. Investors should now consider these commercialization risks, potential future dilution, and the company's valuation, especially given its strong stock performance and continuing losses.

feed.title: Vanguard subsidiary realignment; PFBC holding shown as 0 shares (PFBC)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Preferred Bank (PFBC), reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership following an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately on a disaggregated basis, as per SEC guidance. The filing clarifies Vanguard's reporting structure but does not detail potential holdings by its subsidiaries, which would be disclosed in separate future filings if applicable.

feed.title: How Pulse Biosciences’ nPulse AFib Refocus Will Impact Pulse Biosciences (PLSE) Investors
feed.summary: Pulse Biosciences (PLSE) is shifting its focus to accelerate the development and commercialization of its nPulse Cardiac Catheter Ablation System for Atrial Fibrillation, driven by positive European feasibility data. This strategic refocus, moving capital towards electrophysiology and streamlining other areas, is expected to reshape the company's investment narrative. Investors should consider how this concentration of resources on the promising AFib data could impact future clinical trials, regulatory approvals, and competitive landscape within the electrophysiology market.

feed.title: Perfect Moment Secures $10 Million, 24-Month Secured Loan at 12% From X3 and Krane
feed.summary: Perfect Moment (PMNT) has secured a $10 million senior secured loan at 12% interest from X3 Higher Moment Fund and Krane Capital, structured for 24 months. This financing package aims to repay $5.1 million in insider notes and provide working capital. The deal also includes issuing warrants and selling shares to the lenders, enhancing liquidity and strengthening the company's balance sheet.

feed.title: Dave & Buster's (NASDAQ: PLAY) CLO granted RSUs and performance stock options
feed.summary: Dave & Buster's (NASDAQ: PLAY) Chief Legal Officer, Rodolfo Rodriguez Jr, received a grant of 8,811 restricted stock units and stock options for 26,923 shares with a $22.70 exercise price, and 16,694 shares with a $34.05 exercise price. The RSUs and first set of options vest in three equal annual installments beginning July 14, 2026, while the second set of options are performance-based, contingent on the company's stock reaching specific price targets of $64.12 and $96.18 before February 1, 2028. This filing also corrected an administrative error from prior reports, showing his direct holdings at 22,887 shares of common stock.

feed.title: FDA fast-tracks Praxis drug for rare childhood epilepsy disorders
feed.summary: The FDA has accepted Praxis Precision Medicines' New Drug Application (NDA) for relutrigine for priority review, setting a PDUFA target action date of September 27, 2026. Relutrigine, intended for SCN2A and SCN8A developmental and epileptic encephalopathies (DEEs), has Orphan Drug, Rare Pediatric Disease, and Breakthrough Therapy designations. If approved, it would be the first FDA-approved therapy for these conditions and would be eligible for a Pediatric Review Voucher.

feed.title: Purple Biotech (PPBT) executive reports 9.25M shares plus multi-year options
feed.summary: Michael Schickler, Head of Clinical & Reg Affairs at Purple Biotech (PPBT), has filed an initial ownership report detailing his holdings. The report indicates beneficial ownership of 9,254,472 Ordinary Shares, which include 6,958,334 unvested restricted stock units (RSUs). Schickler also holds several stock options with varying exercise prices and expiration dates, ranging from April 2027 to October 2030, some of which are fully vested while others vest in quarterly installments.

feed.title: Public Policy Holding Company (PPHC) CAO reports 19,139 shares, 9,000 options
feed.summary: Matthew Ross Mazzanti, Chief Administrative Officer of Public Policy Holding Company, Inc. (PPHC), has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his equity holdings. The report indicates direct ownership of 19,139 shares of common stock and options for 9,000 additional shares. These options were granted in May 2022, vested three years later, and have an exercise price of GBP 8.85 (approximately $11.80).

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Plug Power, Inc. (PLUG) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP About Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP reminds investors of Plug Power, Inc. (PLUG) about the upcoming April 3, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Plug Power made materially false and/or misleading statements regarding its business, operations, and prospects between January 17, 2025, and November 13, 2025. Shareholders who suffered losses of $50,000 or more during this period are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Precigen (NASDAQ:PGEN) Shares Down 9% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Precigen (NASDAQ:PGEN) shares dropped 9% on Monday, trading at $3.3390 with significantly lower than average volume. Despite beating EPS estimates, the company missed revenue expectations and has a negative net margin. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $9.50, and institutional investors have recently adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: PepGen stock tumbles 44% on disappointing trial results
feed.summary: PepGen Ltd (NASDAQ:PEPG) shares dropped 44% after-hours following disappointing Phase 2 trial results for its myotonic dystrophy type 1 treatment, PGN-EDODM1. The drug showed an average splicing correction of 7.3% compared to placebo, with an outlier patient significantly impacting the overall mean. Despite the setback, the company plans to report data from a higher dose cohort in late 2026 and has sufficient funding into mid-2027.

feed.title: PepGen reports favorable safety and splicing trends for 5 mg/kg cohort, on track for 10 mg/kg readout
feed.summary: PepGen announced positive safety and splicing results from the 5 mg/kg cohort of its FREEDOM2 trial for PGN-EDODM1, with the drug generally well-tolerated and showing promising trends in splicing correction and vHOT improvement. The company is currently dosing the 10 mg/kg cohort and anticipates data readout in the second half of 2026, with a cash runway extending into the second half of 2027.

feed.title: PepGen advances Phase 2 study with 10 mg/kg DM1 cohort under way
feed.summary: PepGen announced positive data from the 5 mg/kg cohort of its Phase 2 FREEDOM2 MAD study for PGN-EDODM1, a treatment for myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1). These results support the ongoing evaluation of the 10 mg/kg cohort, with data expected in the latter half of 2026. The company is also scheduled to discuss these developments in an upcoming webcast and recently participated in the MDA2026 conference.

feed.title: Procore Technologies Inc (PCOR) Shares Up 4.63% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Procore Technologies Inc's (PCOR) shares rose 4.63% on March 30, reaching an intraday high of $56.79. Analysts project an average target price of $73.43 for PCOR, indicating a 29.32% upside, with a consensus "Outperform" recommendation. GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $99.38, suggesting a 75.01% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Picard Medical, Inc. (PMI) Shareholders Who
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has issued a deadline alert for shareholders of Picard Medical, Inc. (PMI) who suffered losses between September 2, 2025, and October 31, 2025. Investors are urged to contact the firm regarding a securities fraud lawsuit alleging that Picard's stock was subject to an illicit social-media-based promotion scheme. The deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion is April 3, 2026.

feed.title: Picard Medical Announces Milestone Survivability With SynCardia Total Artificial Heart Support
feed.summary: Picard Medical Inc. announced a significant milestone: a patient was supported for 1,636 days (over 53 months) by the SynCardia Total Artificial Heart before successfully receiving a donor transplant. This case highlights the device's ability to sustain critically ill patients with severe biventricular heart failure for extended periods, allowing them to await suitable donor organs at home. The SynCardia Total Artificial Heart replaces both ventricles and all four native heart valves, restoring circulation and demonstrating its potential for long-term mechanical circulatory support.

feed.title: Pliant Therapeutics Launches New $50 Million ATM Program
feed.summary: Pliant Therapeutics (PLRX) has launched a new $50 million "at-the-market" equity program with Leerink Partners, allowing the company to sell common stock to raise capital. This new program replaces a prior 2021 agreement with Cantor Fitzgerald & Co., which was terminated without penalty and with no shares sold. An analyst rating on PLRX stock is currently Hold with a $1.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates the stock as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite some short-term momentum.

feed.title: Fortinet Inc (FTNT) Shares Down 3.49% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Fortinet Inc (FTNT) shares dropped 3.49% on March 30, closing at $78.20 after reaching an intraday low of $76.42. This places FTNT 28.47% below its 52-week high and 11.52% above its 52-week low. Analysts forecast an average target price of $89.90, indicating a 14.96% upside, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $109.17.

feed.title: Danaher Corp. Forms Death Cross, Signaling Potential Bearish Trend Ahead
feed.summary: Danaher Corp. has experienced a "Death Cross," a bearish technical indicator where its short-term moving average crosses below its long-term moving average. The company's stock has declined by 20.71% year-to-date, significantly underperforming the S&P 500. This, combined with bearish technical indicators across multiple timeframes, suggests a need for investors to closely monitor the stock.

feed.title: Maersk named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for fifth consecutive year
feed.summary: A.P. Moller – Maersk has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Logistics (3PL) report for the fifth consecutive year. This report evaluates vendors based on their "Completeness of Vision" and "Ability to Execute" within the 3PL market, which Gartner defines as providers that manage the movement, storage, and distribution of products for clients without taking ownership. The consistent recognition highlights Maersk's strong position and capabilities in offering scalable and customized logistics solutions.

feed.title: Assessing Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) has experienced a recent share price decline, leading investors to question its current valuation. Despite a short-term drop, its long-term shareholder return remains strong, and the company is seen as undervalued by about 42% according to a popular narrative, with a fair value of $547.72. This

feed.title: Thanks to RIAs (in large part), Schwab CEO Rick Wurster's pay leaped 49%, but could have soared higher -- much higher -- if the company hadn't stopped considering Fidelity in its calculations, according to SEC disclosure
feed.summary: Schwab CEO Rick Wurster's compensation increased by 49%, a rise partly attributed to the contributions of RIAs. The SEC disclosure reveals that his pay could have been significantly higher if Schwab had continued to include Fidelity in its executive compensation benchmarking calculations.

feed.title: Jabil: $1.1 Million Donation To Strengthen Manufacturing Talent Pipeline With St. Petersburg College
feed.summary: Jabil has announced a $1.1 million multi-year donation to St. Petersburg College to bolster advanced manufacturing training and strengthen the regional workforce pipeline. The funding will support curriculum development, provide access to manufacturing technology and lab equipment, and expand hands-on training programs, including scholarships for certifications in soldering and mechatronics. This initiative aims to prepare students for in-demand roles in manufacturing sectors like automation and renewable energy, fostering essential talent for U.S. manufacturing growth.

feed.title: Oppenheimer initiates Passage Bio stock with outperform rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has initiated coverage of Passage Bio Inc. (NASDAQ:PASG) with an outperform rating and a price target of $30.00, suggesting a significant upside of 385% from its current price. The firm believes the stock's 46% year-to-date decline is an overreaction to competitor program failures and regulatory concerns, presenting a buying opportunity. Oppenheimer highlighted key differentiators for Passage Bio's lead asset PBFT02 in frontotemporal dementia, projecting $1 billion in peak risk-adjusted sales by 2040.

feed.title: Tokenization push and $1M note shape Oxbridge Re (NASDAQ: OXBR)
feed.summary: Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: OXBR) has filed its 2025 annual report, highlighting its continued focus on fully collateralized property and casualty reinsurance, particularly for Gulf Coast insurers. The company is actively developing a Web3 tokenization platform through its SurancePlus subsidiary, issuing tokenized reinsurance securities like DeltaCat Re and EpsilonCat Re, and recently launched T42:2027 and T20:2027 tokens. Additionally, Oxbridge Re secured a $1 million secured promissory note with a 16% interest rate for working capital, and the report outlines various regulatory, capital, and operational risks associated with its traditional and new tokenization businesses.

feed.title: Pathfinder Bancorp declares $0.10 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ:PBHC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for its voting common and non-voting common stock, payable on May 8, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 17, 2026. The company also declared a $0.10 per notional share dividend for issued warrants. This dividend represents a 3.14% yield, and the company has consistently paid dividends for 31 consecutive years, demonstrating a strong commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: How workers at California's last nuclear plant use generative AI to save time
feed.summary: PG&E's Diablo Canyon nuclear power plant, California's last, has implemented a generative AI tool called Neutron to manage its extensive paperwork. This AI solution drastically reduces the time needed to find critical documents, improving efficiency in regulatory compliance and operations. Developed by Atomic Canyon in collaboration with PG&E, Neutron is the first on-site generative AI tool at a U.S. nuclear plant, highlighting AI's potential to streamline highly regulated industries.

feed.title: PAVmed Inc. 2025 Q4 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:PAVM) 2026-03-30
feed.summary: PAVmed Inc. (PAVM) released its 2025 Q4 earnings, reporting an EPS of -$1.05, beating estimates by $3.45. The company's revenue reached $52.00K, a 420.00% year-over-year increase, also surpassing expectations by $52.00K. The article highlights the earnings call presentation slides published by PAVmed Inc.

feed.title: OraSure Defends Strategy Amid Activist Altai Governance Challenge
feed.summary: OraSure Technologies is defending its performance and governance against activist investor Altai Capital's challenge, asserting that its shareholder returns have met or exceeded those of its peers. The company highlights its focused growth strategy, new diagnostic products, cost-cutting measures, and a debt-free balance sheet with share repurchases as evidence of its commitment to shareholder value. An analyst has a Hold rating on OSUR stock with a $3.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates OSUR as Neutral due to past financial underperformance balanced by signs of stabilization and a promising product pipeline.

feed.title: Assessing Old Second Bancorp (OSBC) Valuation After Evergreen Bank Acquisition Progress
feed.summary: Old Second Bancorp (OSBC) is currently trading at $19.57 and is considered undervalued with a fair value of $23.83, primarily due to the successful integration of the Evergreen Bank acquisition. This acquisition is enhancing profitability and improving asset mix, expected to drive revenue growth and strengthen net interest margin. Despite a slight recent share price softness, longer-term shareholders have seen a 19.34% total return over the past year.

feed.title: Ondas Holdings Faces Challenges Amidst Financial Strain
feed.summary: Ondas Holdings (ONDS) is facing significant financial challenges, reporting a Q4 net loss of $101 million and struggling profitability ratios despite a recent speculative stock surge. The article highlights the volatility of ONDS stock, influenced by speculative trading rather than strong fundamentals, and emphasizes the need for Ondas to improve its financial health and profitability for future stability. Analysts express concern over the underlying financial vulnerabilities, urging thorough analysis before engaging in such speculative investments.

feed.title: Origin Materials explores business combinations amid mounting losses
feed.summary: Origin Materials Inc. is facing slower-than-expected sales for its recyclable PET plastic bottle caps and is now exploring potential business combinations and technology licensing deals. The company reported this Friday, indicating a shift in strategy due to mounting losses and delayed market adoption of its product.

feed.title: OptimizeRx (NASDAQ: OPRX) switches auditors from UHY LLP to Grant Thornton
feed.summary: OptimizeRx (NASDAQ: OPRX) has announced a change in its independent auditor, dismissing UHY LLP and appointing Grant Thornton LLP for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. UHY's audit reports for 2024 and 2025 were unqualified, meaning there were no adverse opinions or disagreements, despite a previously disclosed material weakness in internal control over financial reporting related to third-party data. This change appears to be a standard transition as there were no disagreements or reportable events between OptimizeRx and UHY.

feed.title: Director Loo Took Gee reports initial status at OMS Energy (OMSE) on Form 3
feed.summary: OMS Energy Technologies Inc. director Loo Took Gee has filed an initial Form 3, indicating his position as a director but not a ten percent owner. The filing, dated March 30, 2026, details no reported transactions or derivative positions for Mr. Loo, acting as an opening inventory of his beneficial ownership. This transparency tool helps investors monitor significant stakes and potential conflicts of interest within the company.

feed.title: Holder sells repeated 4,150‑share blocks in ONON (ONON) filing
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for On Holding AG (ONON) reveals a holder is repeatedly selling blocks of 4,150 Class A Ordinary Shares. The filing indicates a reported position of 58,100 Class A Ordinary Shares and notes 296,873,353 shares outstanding as of March 30, 2026. These continuous disposals from January to March 2026 suggest a systematic liquidation strategy by a single holder.

feed.title: Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bull 2X Shares (NUGT) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides the current stock price quote and chart for Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bull 2X Shares (NUGT), an ETF offering 2x leveraged exposure to gold and silver mining firms. It details trading conditions, key statistics like previous close, open price, 1-year change, and intraday range. The article also includes a section with recent articles about other companies like NVIDIA, Tesla, Siemens Energy, and BYD, and client reviews for the trading platform.

feed.title: Empire State Realty OP LP Hits New 52-Week Low at $4.78
feed.summary: Empire State Realty OP LP has hit a new 52-week low of $4.78, down from its high of $8.75, as of March 27, 2026. The microcap company has a market capitalization of $1,394 million, a P/E ratio of 29.00, no dividend yield, and a high debt-equity ratio, with a return on equity of 0.00%. Its performance over the past year has lagged behind the S&P 500, which increased by 11.87%.

feed.title: [8-K] Newton Golf Company, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Newton Golf Company, Inc. announced a significant leadership change, terminating Greg Campbell as Executive Chairman, Chief Executive Officer, and principal executive officer on March 27, 2026. Co-founder Akinobu Yorihiro was appointed Interim Chief Executive Officer, while Brett Hoge became the new Chairperson of the Board. Yorihiro, who also remains Chief Technology Officer, brings extensive experience in M&A and leadership roles from previous companies.

feed.title: NMAX SEC Filings - NEWSMAX INC 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of NEWSMAX (NMAX) SEC filings, including annual 10-K reports, quarterly 10-Q statements, and 8-K material events. It details how the company, an emerging growth company in broadcasting and digital media, reports financial performance, governance, and significant events to the SEC. The platform offers AI-powered summaries for each filing, helping investors quickly grasp key information on revenue trends, segment performance, and governance changes.

feed.title: Technology Solutions (NYSE: CNTM) seeks 15-day extension to file 10-K
feed.summary: ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: CNTM) has announced that it will delay filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company notified the SEC through a Form NT 10-K, citing delays in completing financial statement documentation. ConnectM expects to file the report within the 15-calendar-day extension period as allowed by Rule 12b-25 and anticipates no significant change in its operational results for the period.

feed.title: NXDT’s shift to a REIT structure Presents a Strong Buy Opportunity for Reliable Income Despite External Adviser Risk Premium
feed.summary: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NXDT) has transitioned to a REIT structure, moving from an investment company focusing on diversified real estate holdings across various property types. This shift is expected to enhance liquidity and transparency, making it an attractive option for income-focused investors, despite the inherent risks associated with an external advisory model. The article details the financial implications and portfolio strategies for this new structure, emphasizing its role as an income-generating asset rather than a total return vehicle, with the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting being crucial for governance and investor engagement.

feed.title: Kris Malkoski Newell Brands EXPO Brings Sunshine Back To the Classroom
feed.summary: Newell Brands' EXPO has successfully reintroduced its yellow dry-erase marker, previously discontinued due to poor visibility. Kris Malkoski, CEO of Learning & Development, spearheaded a four-year R&D effort to double the ink's boldness while retaining erasability. The comeback campaign leverages color psychology, pop culture references, and tangible fan feedback to celebrate the return of yellow and the emotional joy it represents.

feed.title: Newell Brands (NASDAQ:NWL) Price Target Lowered to $3.00 at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has lowered its price target for Newell Brands (NASDAQ:NWL) from $5.00 to $3.00, maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a potential 9.77% downside. This comes after Newell Brands reported Q4 EPS of $0.18 but issued a Q1 2026 guidance with a negative EPS range, amidst weaker revenue and a negative net margin. Despite mixed analyst ratings, the consensus remains a "Hold" with a target of $5.80.

feed.title: 22,000 Class A shares proposed sale — NUVL (NASDAQ: NUVL)
feed.summary: Nuvalent, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUVL) has filed a Form 144 to announce the proposed sale of 22,000 Class A Common shares on March 30, 2026, as a result of a stock option exercise. The filing also details prior open-market disposals by Darlene Noci of 4,000 shares on December 30, 2025, 5,500 shares on January 29, 2026, and another 5,500 shares on February 26, 2026. These transactions involve restricted or insider-held shares being sold to the public under Rule 144.

feed.title: Chevron's downstream assets at Wheatstone gas facility suffer extensive damage due to cyclone
feed.summary: Chevron announced that its Wheatstone liquefied natural gas facility in Western Australia incurred extensive damage from tropical cyclone Narelle. The company expects the facility to be out of full production for several weeks while repairs are underway. This incident highlights the vulnerability of energy infrastructure to extreme weather events.

feed.title: Walmart Mexico Rolls Out Connected Store Platform
feed.summary: Walmart Mexico is expanding its partnership with Vusion to integrate the EdgeSense connected store platform across all Walmart Express stores, with plans to extend to Supercenters and test in Bodega formats. This initiative aims to modernize store operations with AI, enhance personalization, streamline the shopper experience, and boost associate productivity through the deployment of electronic shelf labels and smart rails. This marks the first major deployment of EdgeSense in Latin America, following a similar rollout in Walmart's U.S. stores.

feed.title: Prudential Financial, Inc. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. has undergone a stock evaluation revision due to current market dynamics, with its stock priced at $93.22, showing a slight increase. However, the company has struggled with a -14.08% return over the past year, significantly underperforming the S&P 500's 18.81% return, and technical indicators suggest a bearish sentiment.

feed.title: Photronics (PLAB) director exercises 5,000 options and sells 5,000 shares
feed.summary: Photronics Inc. director Lee Kang Jyh exercised stock options for 5,000 common shares at $10.75 per share and subsequently sold the same number of shares at $40.80 per share in an open-market transaction. Following these transactions, which occurred on March 26, 2026, he directly holds 385,850 common shares. The options exercised were part of a grant that vested starting March 7, 2017, and were set to expire on March 7, 2027.
